title: Dense Raw Kenyan Corn Bread
description: A dense, mustardy, and chewy Kenyan corn bread made with raw-friendly ingredients, perfect for a sick day.
instructions: Preheat your sous vide machine to 165F and cook a raw block of coconut oil for 1 hour.
In a blender or food processor, blend the raw honey, apple cider vinegar, mustard powder, salt, and black pepper to make a smooth sauce.
Add the creamy cashew cheese and blend until smooth and creamy.
In a large bowl, combine the raw cornmeal, sauce, and blended cheese mixture.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it's smooth and sticky.
Shape the dough into a round loaf and place it in a lined baking sheet.
Sous vide the bread for 4 hours at 165F.
Remove the bread from the sous vide machine and let it cool for 30 minutes before slicing and serving.
